description: This file contains utility functions for Bootstrap, including DOM manipulation, style computations, selector parsing, and event handling. It defines constants and utility methods used throughout Bootstrap's JavaScript components.

methods.name: parseSelector
methods.description: Escapes IDs in CSS selectors to handle special characters, using CSS.escape if available.

methods.name: toType
methods.description: Returns a lowercase string representing the type of the given object.

methods.name: getUID
methods.description: Generates a unique ID with the specified prefix, ensuring it doesn't conflict with existing element IDs.

methods.name: getTransitionDurationFromElement
methods.description: Calculates the total transition duration in milliseconds for a DOM element based on its CSS properties.

methods.name: triggerTransitionEnd
methods.description: Dispatches a 'transitionend' event for the given element.

methods.name: isElement
methods.description: Checks if the provided object is a DOM element.

methods.name: getElement
methods.description: Retrieves a DOM element from a selector string or DOM object.

methods.name: isVisible
methods.description: Determines if a DOM element is visible and not hidden.

methods.name: isDisabled
methods.description: Checks if a DOM element is disabled.

methods.name: findShadowRoot
methods.description: Finds the shadow root of an element, if any.

methods.name: noop
methods.description: Empty function used as a placeholder.

methods.name: reflow
methods.description: Restarts a CSS animation by forcing reflow on the element.

methods.name: getjQuery
methods.description: Returns the jQuery object if available and not disabled by data attribute.

methods.name: onDOMContentLoaded
methods.description: Registers a callback to run when the DOM content is loaded.

methods.name: isRTL
methods.description: Checks if the document direction is right-to-left.

methods.name: defineJQueryPlugin
methods.description: Defines a jQuery plugin for the provided Bootstrap plugin.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Executes a callback function with provided arguments, or returns a default value.

methods.name: executeAfterTransition
methods.description: Executes a callback after a CSS transition on an element completes.

methods.name: getNextActiveElement
methods.description: Returns the next or previous element in a list, with optional cyclic behavior.

methods.name: AnonymousFunction83ee89330100(exports)
methods.description: unavailable
